subject: Excited to connect at the conference, Nick Stocks
body:
Hi Nick Stocks,

Saw you'll be at the conference and noticed your work at White Star Capital. Would love to swap notes on Fintech, digital platforms, Good Connection, Stage: Series A/B.

[Lightfern will polish this in Gmail]


--- CONTEXT FOR LIGHTFERN (remove before sending) ---
Context for Lightfern (delete before sending):
interests: Fintech, digital platforms, Good Connection, Stage: Series A/B
